title: Chaturshringi Temple
tagline: Chaturshringi Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: The Chattushringi Temple also spelt as Chattushrungi Temple is a Hindu temple in the city of Pune in Maharashtra state of India.
overview.description: The Chattushringi Temple also spelt as Chattushrungi Temple is a Hindu temple in the city of Pune in Maharashtra state of India. The temple is located on the slope of a hill on Senapati Bapat Road. It is said to have been built during the reign of the Maratha king Shivaji. The temple is looked after by Chattushringi Devasthan (Temple) trustees.

topPlaces.name: Chaturshringi Hill
topPlaces.description: Chaturshringi Hill is a hill in Pune, Maharashtra state in west India. There is a famous temple of Goddess Chaturshingi (also known as Goddess Ambareshwari) at the top of this hill.

topPlaces.name: Lok Bhavan, Pune
topPlaces.description: Lok Bhavan formerly Raj Bhavan, Pune is the monsoon official residence of the governor of Maharashtra. It is located in the city of Pune, India.

topPlaces.name: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing
topPlaces.description: The Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC) is an Indian autonomous scientific society, operating under the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology.

image.alt: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing

topPlaces.name: Pune division
topPlaces.description: Pune Division (better known as Paschim Maharashtra or Desh) is one of the six administrative divisions of the Indian State of Maharashtra. Pune Division is bound by Konkan Division to the west, Nashik Division to the north, Aurangabad Division to the east, and the state of Karnataka to the south.

topPlaces.name: National Chemical Laboratory
topPlaces.description: The National Chemical Laboratory (NCL) is an Indian government laboratory based in Pune, in western India. Popularly known as NCL, a constituent member of the Council of Scientific & Industrial Research (CSIR) India, it was established in 1950.

topPlaces.name: Shivajinagar, Pune
topPlaces.description: Shivajinagar (also known as Bhambwade, Bhamburde) is an inner suburb of the city of Pune, India.

topPlaces.name: Vetal Hill
topPlaces.description: Vetal Hill (Marathi: वेताळ टेकडी ) is a prominent hill in the city limits of Pune, India. The hill is the highest point within the city limits, with an elevation of 800 meters (2,600 ft).

topPlaces.name: Pangaloli
topPlaces.description: Pangaloli is a village in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 548 ha (1,354 acres).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chaturshringi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chaturshringi Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chaturshringi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (11 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (5 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chaturshringi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chaturshringi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chaturshringi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chaturshringi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chaturshringi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chaturshringi Hill, Lok Bhavan, Pune, Centre for Development of Advanced Computing, Pune division, National Chemical Laboratory.
